ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "uid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each incident (external ID) */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the incident was reported */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date the incident occurred */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the incident occurred */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the incident occurred */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident type */,
  "incident_subtype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the victim is associated with */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the victim */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the victim */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the victim */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the victim */,
  "victim_type" TEXT /* Type of victim (e.g., individual, business) */,
  "relationship_to_offender" TEXT /* Relationship of the victim to the offender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_victims_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "incident_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_subtypes" (
  "incident_subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident subtype */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident type the subtype belongs to */,
  "incident_subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident subtype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigations" (
  "investigation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigation */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the investigation is associated with */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the investigation (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investigator handling the case */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the investigation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the investigation ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigations_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigator_id") REFERENCES investigators ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the investigator */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the investigator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the investigator belongs to */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the investigator */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dispositions" (
  "disposition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disposition */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the disposition is associated with */,
  "disposition_name" TEXT /* Name of the disposition (e.g., Closed without arrest, Closed by arrest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disposition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disposition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dispositions_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_crime_data" (
  "geographic_crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic crime data point */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the crime occurred */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the crime occurred */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the crime location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the crime location */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate of the area */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geographic_crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investigator, analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_comments_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the file is associated with */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, image) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_files_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_offenders" (
  "offender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offender */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the offender is associated with */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the offender */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the offender */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the offender */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the offender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_offenders_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_offender_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the relationship is associated with */,
  "offender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offender */,
  "related_offender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related offender */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., partner, associate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_offender_relationships_offender_id FOREIGN KEY ("offender_id") REFERENCES incident_offenders ("offender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_offender_relationships_related_offender_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_offender_id") REFERENCES incident_offenders ("offender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_offender_relationships_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
